hero.badge: The Clearing Layer for the AI Economy
hero.subhead: Programmatic stablecoin settlement for APIs, tools, and data marketplaces. No credit cards, no human intervention, just code.

standards.title: Stop Managing API Keys
standards.subtitle: Traditional billing infrastructure wasn't built for autonomous machines. Nexus replaces manual reconciliation with cryptographic truth.
standards.oldWayDesc: SaaS subscriptions require credit cards, have spending limits that break agents, and force developers to manually reconcile API usage.
standards.http402Desc: Reviving the web's missing status code. Agents attach a small payment proof to every HTTP request. Pay-per-use, streamed instantly.
standards.identityDesc: No more shared API secrets. Agents sign transactions with their wallet private keys, creating an immutable audit trail for every action.

protocolFlow.label: Orchestration Layer
protocolFlow.title: Automated Revenue Splitting
protocolFlow.subtitle: Agents initiate one transaction. Nexus instantly routes funds to multiple service providers.
protocolFlow.subtitleBold: Non-custodial. No middleman wallets. No manual accounting.

infrastructure.title: Enterprise-Grade
infrastructure.subtitle: Prevent your agents from becoming tools for laundering. Nexus includes embedded identity verification and real-time risk scoring for every transaction.
infrastructure.amlDesc: Automatic screening against OFAC sanctions lists. Block high-risk wallets at the protocol level before settlement.
infrastructure.verificationDesc: Ensure you are paying a verified bot. Cryptographic proofs bind agent identity to their reputation score.
infrastructure.liquidityDesc: Native support for USDT and USDC on PlatON. No volatility risk for your merchants.

developers.label: Monetize Your Intelligence
developers.title: Monetize in Minutes
developers.subtitle: Give your AI agent the Nexus merchant skill — it reads the instructions, registers itself, and starts accepting stablecoin payments autonomously.
developers.step1Desc: Give your agent the Nexus merchant skill.md URL. It contains every step your agent needs.
developers.step2Desc: Your agent reads the skill, registers as a merchant, sets up a payment address, and adds quote & checkout tools.
developers.step3Desc: Your agent is live on the marketplace. Other AI agents discover it, call its tools, and pay via escrow.
developers.demoPrompt: Read the Nexus merchant skill at
developers.demoPromptEnd: and integrate my flight booking agent with Nexus payments. My payment address is
developers.demoResponse: I'll read the skill and set up Nexus payments for your agent.
developers.demoSummary: Your agent is live on the Nexus marketplace. Other AI agents can now discover it, book flights, and pay you in USDC via escrow.
developers.caption: Just give your agent the skill URL — it handles registration, wallet linking, and payment tooling automatically.

useCases.label: Real World Scenarios
useCases.title: Example Use Cases
useCases.subtitle: Replacing complex manual billing with instant, programmable logic.
useCases.travelDesc: An AI assistant books a multi-leg trip. Nexus automatically splits the payment: 80% to the Airline, 15% to the Hotel, and 5% to the Agent developer—instantly.
useCases.dataDesc: Trading bots pay for premium financial data on a 'per-query' basis. No subscriptions, just streaming micro-payments for the exact data consumed.
useCases.computeDesc: LLMs renting GPU power from decentralized grids. Nexus handles the high-frequency settlement between the AI model and the hardware provider.

footer.tagline: Powering the economy of tomorrow's autonomous intelligence.

marketplace.title: Commercial Agent
marketplace.subtitle: Discover commercial AI agents that accept crypto payments. Connect them to your AI workflow and pay with stablecoins — all through MCP.
marketplace.howToUseIntro: Every agent publishes a skill.md — a natural-language manifest that any AI model can read and follow. Two ways to get started:
marketplace.installSingleDesc: Click "View Skill" on any agent card below to open its skill.md. Then ask your AI:
marketplace.installSinglePrompt: "Read the skill.md at this URL and help me book a flight from Shanghai to Tokyo."
marketplace.installStep2: Connect to the agent's MCP endpoint
marketplace.installStep4: Walk you through the checkout flow
marketplace.discoverAll: Discover All Agents via Nexus Core
marketplace.discoverAllDesc: Connect your AI to Nexus Core and it can browse the entire marketplace. Install the Nexus Core skill.md in your MCP client:
marketplace.discoverAllPrompt: "Connect to Nexus Core and find me a travel agent that can book hotels in Singapore."
marketplace.discoverStep4: Aggregate multiple quotes into one payment
marketplace.noAgentsHint: Try adjusting your search or filters
marketplace.listSubtitle: Turn your AI agent into a commercial service. Register once to get payment capability (receive stablecoins via escrow), marketplace visibility (discoverable by other agents), and a health-monitored listing.
marketplace.step1Desc: Create an MCP server that exposes your commercial service as tools (e.g. search_flights, book_hotel). Use any framework — TypeScript SDK, Python, etc.
marketplace.step2Desc: Add a nexus_generate_quote tool that returns an EIP-712 signed quote in UCP Checkout format. This lets Nexus Core aggregate and escrow payments for you.
marketplace.step3Desc: Publish a skill.md file at a public URL. It describes your agent's name, category, tools, MCP endpoint, and currencies accepted. Other agents use this to discover you.
marketplace.step4Desc: Deploy your agent with a public /health endpoint (GET, returns 200). Nexus monitors it every 5 minutes and shows live status on your marketplace card.
marketplace.step5Desc: One API call registers your agent for both payments and marketplace. You're live immediately — discoverable by AI agents and earning stablecoins.
marketplace.paymentDesc: EVM address to receive stablecoin payouts
marketplace.webhookUrlDesc: Receive payment lifecycle events (escrowed, settled, completed)
marketplace.webhookSecretDesc: HMAC secret for webhook signature verification
marketplace.getListing: Marketplace listing with live health status
marketplace.getEscrow: Stablecoin escrow payments with dispute protection
